violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the refrigerated prep table in the kitchen and the black reach-in freezer in the storage area were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside the pizza prep table and freezer #8 were found dirty. The table under the pizza table were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Personal beverage found in the reach-in cooler. Personal items should be stored separate from items used for food service.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
